name: STS Risk Calculator
prerequisites: iOS Simulator or Android Emulator running
Valid test credentials (see Test Users sheet in Excel)
Network access to STS web portal for account creation flow
appMap:
graph TD
    START[STS Splash] -->|Log in| TOS[Terms of Service]
    TOS -->|Scroll and I Agree| AUTH[Webview OAuth]
    AUTH -->|Auto-login| HOME[Calculators Home]

    HOME -->|03 ACSD Operative| ACSD[ACSD Calculator]
    HOME -->|09 Mitral Regurgitation| MITRAL[Mitral Calculator]
    HOME -->|13 Isolated Tricuspid| TRICUSPID[Tricuspid Calculator]
    HOME -->|14 SAVR After TAVR| SAVR[SAVR Calculator]
    HOME -->|15 Multi-Valve| MULTI[Multi-Valve Calculator]
    HOME -->|10 Esophagectomy| ESOPH[Esophagectomy Calculator]
    HOME -->|16 Lung Cancer| LUNG[Lung Cancer Calculator]
    HOME -->|17 Ascending Aorta| AORTA[Ascending Aorta Calculator]
    HOME -->|Settings| SETTINGS[Settings]
    HOME -->|Search| SEARCH[Search]
    HOME -->|Recent Cases| RECENT[Recent Case Detail]

    ACSD -->|tab-replacement arch| ACSD_PS[Planned Surgery]
    ACSD_PS -->|surgeryType, incidence, priority| ACSD_DEMO[Demographics]
    ACSD_DEMO -->|sex, age, ht, wt, race| ACSD_LAB[Laboratory Values]
    ACSD_LAB -->|creatinine, hct, wbc, plt| ACSD_MED[Preoperative Medications]
    ACSD_MED --> ACSD_RF[Risk Factors]
    ACSD_RF -->|pulm, vasc, cardiac, CAD, valve, arrhythmia| ACSD_RES[Patient Summary]

    MITRAL -->|tab-replacement arch| MITRAL_DEMO[Demographics]
    MITRAL_DEMO -->|sex, age, ht, wt, race| MITRAL_RF[Risk Factors]
    MITRAL_RF -->|cardiac subsections| MITRAL_LAB[Lab Results]
    MITRAL_LAB --> MITRAL_CD[Cardiac Details]
    MITRAL_CD --> MITRAL_RES[Patient Summary]

    TRICUSPID -->|tab-replacement arch| TRI_PS[Planned Surgery]
    TRI_PS -->|tricuspidSurgery, priority, incidence| TRI_DEMO[Demographics]
    TRI_DEMO -->|sex, age, ht, wt, race| TRI_LAB[Laboratory Values]
    TRI_LAB -->|creatinine, hct, wbc, plt, alb, bili, INR| TRI_MED[Preop Medications]
    TRI_MED --> TRI_RF[Risk Factors]
    TRI_RF -->|pulm, vasc, cardiac, CAD, valve, arrhythmia| TRI_RES[Patient Summary]

    SAVR -->|single-long-scroll arch| SAVR_SD[Surgical Details]
    SAVR_SD -->|plannedSurgery, approach, priority, incidence| SAVR_DEMO[Demographics inline]
    SAVR_DEMO --> SAVR_LAB[Lab Values inline]
    SAVR_LAB -->|4 fields| SAVR_RF[Risk Factors]
    SAVR_RF -->|pulm, vasc, cardiac, CAD, valve, arrhythmia| SAVR_RES[Patient Summary]

    MULTI -->|single-long-scroll arch| MULTI_ST[Surgery Type]
    MULTI_ST -->|AVR, mitralValve, CABG, anatomy, priority, incidence| MULTI_DEMO[Demographics inline]
    MULTI_DEMO --> MULTI_LAB[Lab Values inline 7 fields]
    MULTI_LAB -->|creatinine, hct, wbc, plt, alb, bili, INR| MULTI_RF[Risk Factors]
    MULTI_RF -->|pulm, vasc, cardiac, CAD, valve, arrhythmia| MULTI_RES[Patient Summary]

    ESOPH -->|thoracic hybrid arch| ESOPH_PS[Planned Surgery]
    ESOPH_PS -->|resectionType, approach, priority, ASA, ECOG| ESOPH_DEMO[Demographics]
    ESOPH_DEMO -->|sex, age, ht, wt, race, payor| ESOPH_CCS[Clinical Cancer Staging]
    ESOPH_CCS -->|tStage, nodes, metastasis, histology| ESOPH_TL[Tumor Location]
    ESOPH_TL --> ESOPH_IT[Induction Treatment]
    ESOPH_IT --> ESOPH_RF[Risk Factors]
    ESOPH_RF -->|smoking, cardiopulm, creatinine, vascular| ESOPH_RES[Patient Summary]

    LUNG -->|thoracic hybrid arch| LUNG_PS[Planned Surgery scroll-UP recovery]
    LUNG_PS -->|resectionType, approach, priority, ASA, ECOG| LUNG_DEMO[Demographics inline]
    LUNG_DEMO -->|sex, age, ht, wt, race, payor| LUNG_CCS[Clinical Cancer Staging]
    LUNG_CCS -->|lymphNodes, metastasis skip tumorSize| LUNG_TL[Tumor Location]
    LUNG_TL -->|lungSide, lobe| LUNG_IT[Induction Treatment]
    LUNG_IT --> LUNG_RF[Risk Factors]
    LUNG_RF -->|pulm fxn, cardio, vasc, kidney| LUNG_RES[Patient Summary]

    AORTA -->|single-long-scroll arch| AORTA_ST[Surgery Type]
    AORTA_ST -->|plannedSurgery, circArrest, aortaDisease, priority, incidence| AORTA_DEMO[Demographics inline]
    AORTA_DEMO --> AORTA_LAB[Lab Values inline 7 fields]
    AORTA_LAB -->|creatinine, hct, wbc, plt, alb, bili, INR| AORTA_RF[Risk Factors]
    AORTA_RF -->|pulm, vasc, cardiac, CAD, valve, arrhythmia| AORTA_RES[Patient Summary]

    SETTINGS -->|Face ID| FACE_ID[Toggle]
    SETTINGS -->|Terms and Conditions| TC[Webview]
    SETTINGS -->|Privacy Policy| PP[Webview]
    SETTINGS -->|Log Out| START

    style HOME fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style ACSD_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style MITRAL_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style TRI_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style SAVR_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style MULTI_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style ESOPH_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style LUNG_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style AORTA_RES fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
    style SETTINGS fill:#45E0A8,stroke:#333,color:#000
